---
title: "Pupil Size Is a Marker of Intelligence"

pub-authors:
  - Tsukahara
  - Burgoyne
  - Engle

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-06-01"
venue: "Scientific American Mind"
pub-type: "Popular Writing"
pub-status: "Published"

projects:
  - brain

categories:
  - locus-coeruleus

pdf: ""
data: ""
code: ""
doi: ""
link: "https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/pupil-size-is-a-marker-of-intelligence/"

listing-page: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>.quarto-title-meta { display: none !important; } .quarto-title-block .abstract { display: none !important; }</style>
---

{{< include ../../../assets/_meta-publication.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_download-buttons.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_pdf-viewer.qmd >}}
